facebook.caption:
16,616 reviews. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc keeps delivering.

Most tourists stick to the beaches. They skip the biggest amusement park in Vietnam. Big mistake.

Rides, water slides, live shows, and views over Bãi Dài, all in one place. Kids go wild. Adults actually stay entertained.

If you have one full day to burn, this is where it goes.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Crowds screaming on rides, water slides dropping into the ocean backdrop, live shows lighting up the night. VinWonders Phú Quốc earns every one of those 16,616 reviews.

Bãi Dài backdrop, rides, shows. One full day, zero regrets.
